blended.narrative: Sleeping Giant is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 7,190 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 48".
